messages.content: You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar o provider OCI no Terraform pela primeira vez?

Configuração inicial do provider OCI:

**1. Gere API key:**
```bash
openssl genrsa -out ~/.oci/oci_api_key.pem 2048
chmod go-rwx ~/.oci/oci_api_key.pem
openssl rsa -pubout -in ~/.oci/oci_api_key.pem -out ~/.oci/oci_api_key_public.pem
```

**2. Upload da chave pública no OCI Console: Identity → Users → API Keys**

**3. Provider config:**
```hcl
terraform {
  required_providers {
    oci = { source = "oracle/oci"; version = "~> 5.0" }
  }
}

provider "oci" {
  tenancy_ocid     = var.tenancy_ocid
  user_ocid        = var.user_ocid
  fingerprint      = var.fingerprint
  private_key_path = var.private_key_path
  region           = var.region
}
```

**4. terraform init && terraform validate**

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar autenticação com instance principal no Terraform?

Instance Principal (mais seguro que API keys):

**1. Provider config:**
```hcl
provider "oci" {
  region       = var.region
  auth         = "InstancePrincipal"
  tenancy_ocid = var.tenancy_ocid
}
```

**2. Dynamic Group:**
```hcl
resource "oci_identity_dynamic_group" "tf_group" {
  compartment_id = var.tenancy_ocid
  name           = "terraform-instances"
  matching_rule  = "ALL {instance.compartment.id = '${var.compartment_ocid}'}"
}
```

**3. Policy:**
```hcl
statements = ["Allow dynamic-group ${oci_identity_dynamic_group.tf_group.name} to manage all-resources in compartment ${var.compartment_name}"]
```

**Vantagens:** Sem rotação manual, sem risco de expor credenciais

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar múltiplas regiões no provider OCI do Terraform?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Erro 'not authenticated' ao rodar terraform apply. Como troubleshootar?

Troubleshooting de autenticação:

**1. Teste com OCI CLI:** oci iam compartment list

**2. Verifique fingerprint:**
```bash
openssl rsa -pubout -outform DER -in ~/.oci/oci_api_key.pem | openssl md5 -c
```

**3. Verifique:** caminho da chave privada (use absoluto), OCIDs válidos, permissões 600 na chave

**4. Debug:** TF_LOG=DEBUG terraform apply 2>&1 | grep -i auth

**5. Problemas comuns:** região inválida, policy insuficiente, chave revogada

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como usar variáveis de ambiente para credenciais OCI no Terraform?

Credenciais via variáveis de ambiente:

```bash
export TF_VAR_tenancy_ocid="ocid1.tenancy.oc1..xxxxx"
export TF_VAR_user_ocid="ocid1.user.oc1..xxxxx"
export TF_VAR_fingerprint="xx:xx:xx:xx"
export TF_VAR_private_key_path="/home/user/.oci/oci_api_key.pem"
export TF_VAR_region="us-ashburn-1"
```

**Segurança:** sensitive = true nas variáveis, .gitignore para .env, use OCI Vault em produção

**CI/CD:** Configure como secrets no pipeline

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar version pinning do provider OCI para evitar breaking changes?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como migrar de API key para Instance Principal sem downtime?

Migração gradual:

**1. Crie Dynamic Group e Policy** para a instância

**2. Provider com toggle:**
```hcl
variable "use_instance_principal" { type = bool; default = false }

provider "oci" {
  auth             = var.use_instance_principal ? "InstancePrincipal" : "APIKey"
  tenancy_ocid     = var.tenancy_ocid
  user_ocid        = var.use_instance_principal ? null : var.user_ocid
  fingerprint      = var.use_instance_principal ? null : var.fingerprint
  private_key_path = var.use_instance_principal ? null : var.private_key_path
}
```

**3. Teste:** export TF_VAR_use_instance_principal=true && terraform plan

**4. Valide e remova API keys**

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar compartment default e tenancy no provider OCI?

Configuração de compartment:

**1. Tenancy (obrigatório):** tenancy_ocid = var.tenancy_ocid

**2. Compartment:** O provider OCI não tem default - especifique em cada resource:
```hcl
resource "oci_core_vcn" "main" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
}
```

**3. Hierarquia:** Tenancy → dev/staging/production → networking/compute

**4. Data source:**
```hcl
data "oci_identity_compartments" "prod" {
  compartment_id = var.tenancy_ocid
  name           = "production"
}
```

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar provider OCI com resource principal em OKE?

Resource Principal para OKE:

```hcl
provider "oci" {
  region       = var.region
  auth         = "ResourcePrincipal"
  tenancy_ocid = var.tenancy_ocid
}
```

**Pré-requisitos:** Dynamic Group para OKE com matching rule: resource.type = 'cluster'

**Policy:** Allow dynamic-group to manage all-resources

**Auth types:** APIKey (dev local), InstancePrincipal (Compute), ResourcePrincipal (OKE, Functions), SecurityToken (sessão temporária)

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in provider configuration. Provide technical guidance on authentication and provider settings.
Como configurar provider OCI com security token authentication?

Security Token authentication:

**1. Gere o token:**
```bash
oci iam security-token create --user-id <ocid> --ttl-in-seconds 3600
```

**2. Provider config:**
```hcl
provider "oci" {
  region            = var.region
  auth              = "SecurityToken"
  security_token_file = "/path/to/token"
  tenancy_ocid      = var.tenancy_ocid
}
```

**3. Use cases:** CI/CD pipelines, acesso temporário, automação

**4. Vantagem:** Token expira automaticamente, mais seguro que API key de longa duração

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
